title: Plant Care Captain
description: A warm daily coach for close observation and gentle care of a real plant through watering, turning, dusting, and misting routines.
learningGoals: Care for a living thing with gentle hands
Observe leaves and soil closely before acting
Build a repeatable plant-care responsibility routine
Notice when soil and leaves need different kinds of care
interactionModel: tap the large done row after each real-world plant-care step; calm timers leave room for close observation and gentle handling
feedbackModel: warm ship-captain voice with sparkle, tick, and tada SFX; every completed step treats the plant as a valued crew member

modes.title: Care Round
modes.skill: daily observation, soil checking, and careful watering

modes.title: Plant Spa Day
modes.skill: gentle leaf cleaning and occasional plant care

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
